title: Issue 1969 lane stack

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the full GitHub #1969 lane as a stacked branch/PR sequence covering child issues #1970-#1974.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Preserve proof, residue, next action, uncertainty, and honest closure; avoid prompt-prose classifiers, hidden reasoning scoring, terse persona changes, and broad always-on context dumps.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact packet helper names, compact projection placement, branch boundaries, and focused test shape, while preserving child issue acceptance criteria.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement shared state-delta packet builders and expose them through ordinary start, implement, report, and skill surfaces.
proof_expectations: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --changed <paths> --task "Implement the full #1969 lane in stacked PRs. Switch to master and pull origin before starting work." --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
completion_criteria: #1970 current_decision packet is exposed and tested in an ordinary workflow.
#1971 message_economy contract is exposed and tested without materially bloating simple output.
#1972 continuation_capsule supports resume/recheck without prose recap and is tested.
#1973 evidence_bundle names decision, minimal evidence, outcomes, response shape, and escalation triggers and is tested.
#1974 shipped workspace-operating-loop skill is updated, packaged, registered, and tested for discoverability.
#1969 parent evidence shows state-delta-first behavior across more than one workflow class.

goal: Create a bounded plan for Issue 1969 lane stack.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Implement the full GitHub #1969 lane as a stacked branch/PR sequence covering child issues #1970-#1974.
intent.constraints: Preserve proof, residue, next action, uncertainty, and honest closure; avoid prompt-prose classifiers, hidden reasoning scoring, terse persona changes, and broad always-on context dumps.
intent.latitude: Exact packet helper names, compact projection placement, branch boundaries, and focused test shape, while preserving child issue acceptance criteria.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Implement shared state-delta packet builders and expose them through ordinary start, implement, report, and skill surfaces.
execution.proof: Run focused workspace CLI tests plus AW implement/summary proof routing.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Make the ordinary AW operating loop state-delta-first across current decision, message economy, continuation, evidence bundles, and skill adoption.

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement the full #1969 lane in stacked PRs.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Land all #1969 child slices in an ordered stack from master.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add compact state-delta packet builders/projections and update the shipped operating-loop skill.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Runtime/reporting packet helpers, start/implement compact projections, focused CLI tests, installed skill registry/payload mirrors, and this planning/lane record.
execution_bounds.max changed files: about 12 product/test/skill files plus planning state
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py; AW implement and summary proof routing.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Continue from the next child slice branch in the #1969 stack; preserve compact packet semantics and focused proof.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement the full GitHub #1969 lane as a stacked branch/PR sequence covering child issues #1970-#1974.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Preserve proof, residue, next action, uncertainty, and honest closure; avoid prompt-prose classifiers, hidden reasoning scoring, terse persona changes, and broad always-on context dumps.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact packet helper names, compact projection placement, branch boundaries, and focused test shape, while preserving child issue acceptance criteria.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.
post_decomposition_delegation.required evidence: slice id, route, reason, quality risk, token-saving class, read-first refs, write scope, proof burden, stop conditions, and return contract
post_decomposition_delegation.route skipped reason: Full #1969 lane needs coordinated package/runtime/skill changes in one local stack; splitting across external agents would add merge and intent risk.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

active_milestone.scope: Stack controller for child issues #1970-#1974 under lane issue-1969-state-delta-loop.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Create a bounded plan for Issue 1969 lane stack.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
